summary: Full backend and frontend testing of MyStudyBody app. All 7 backend API tests passed. All 4 tabs load correctly, navigation works, Pomodoro timer starts/pauses/resets correctly, Scanner viewfinder visible, Reports weekly/monthly toggle works.

integration_issues.flow: Reports - Monthly/Weekly toggle vs real data
integration_issues.issue: When period toggle is changed, useEffect overwrites real DB data with mock data. The fetchErrors() on mount sets real data, but period toggle useEffect always resets to MOCK_WEEKLY_ERRORS or MOCK_MONTHLY_ERRORS, losing real backend data.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver warnings in web preview - expected behavior for Expo web, not a native app bug
Version mismatch: installed 55.0.13 but expo expects ~17.0.10. May cause compatibility issues.

action_items: Fix Reports screen: period toggle useEffect (line 47-49 in reports.tsx) overwrites real backend data with mock. Should only use mock when no real data is available, not on every period change.
Fix expo-image-picker version: installed 55.0.13 but expected ~17.0.10. Run: yarn add expo-image-picker@~17.0.10
critical_code_review_comments: reports.tsx line 47-49: useEffect on period change always resets errorData to MOCK data, discarding fetched real data. Should merge both logic paths.
Save session API call on pomodoro.tsx uses duration=0 if timer not started (STUDY_TIME - STUDY_TIME = 0), but Math.max(1,...) saves it as 1 min - acceptable but could be confusing.

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all screens load and interact correctly; minor integration issue in Reports period toggle

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Physics/Kinematics error scan and TEST_Math/25min session via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: First test run. App is fully functional. Main issue: Reports period toggle useEffect overwrites real data with mock data on period change. expo-image-picker version mismatch warning present.
